name: chipletos
description: Drive the ChipletOS chiplet-packaging + Photonic Signoff platform from any MCP-compatible agent. Predict impedance, run multi-objective Pareto inverse design, validate DRC, cross-check vs literature, generate fab-ready coupons, and design silicon-photonic waveguides through 14 tools wrapping the public Genesis API.

CHIPLETOS_API_URL.description: ChipletOS Genesis API base URL (defaults to the public Modal endpoint).

CHIPLETOS_API_KEY.description: Optional API key for gated routes (predict-impedance, export-fab). Issued from the ChipletOS dashboard.

tools.name: chipletos_predict_impedance
tools.description: Predict Z₀ for a given TGV geometry across the public glass set.

tools.name: chipletos_pareto_design
tools.description: Multi-objective Pareto inverse design across {Z₀, loss, crosstalk, yield}.

tools.name: chipletos_inverse_design
tools.description: Differentiable-surrogate inverse design: target Z₀ → geometry.

tools.name: chipletos_cross_solver_matrix
tools.description: 100-geometry cross-solver disagreement witness (BEM vs Palace vs OpenEMS vs gprMax).

tools.name: chipletos_drc_validate
tools.description: Glass-interposer DRC with IPC/SEMI defect codes.

tools.name: chipletos_validate_against_measurement
tools.description: Surrogate vs literature/measurement cross-check (honest source_type disclosure).

tools.name: chipletos_lab_readiness_score
tools.description: Composite 0-100 lab-readiness score with verdict bands.

tools.name: chipletos_search_s2p_library
tools.description: Search the curated S2P Touchstone library by glass, pitch, thickness.

tools.name: chipletos_generate_coupon
tools.description: Generate a fab-ready coupon bundle (DRC + stack-up + SOW + cost).

tools.name: chipletos_predict_waveguide_mode
tools.description: Predict Neff, ng, propagation loss, and bend loss for a Si or SiN photonic waveguide via TMM analytical model.

tools.name: chipletos_photonic_signoff_health
tools.description: ChipletOS Photonic Signoff capability inventory — primitives, solver stack, audit gates.

tools.name: chipletos_photonic_drc
tools.description: AIM Photonics-class DRC on photonic geometries (waveguides, rings, gratings).

tools.name: chipletos_photonic_validate_ieee
tools.description: Validate the analytical TMM waveguide solver against 5 published Si-photonic Neff references.

tools.name: chipletos_leaderboard
tools.description: Open Glass-TGV signoff benchmark leaderboard (kNN/RF/surrogate baselines, BEM-truth public-glass split — not VNA-measured).
